names: has and bears unto her daughter ISHARA SILVA

does hereby for herself her heirs executors and administrators covenant and declare to and with the said Donee that the said Donor now has good right to convey the said premises in the Schedule hereto fully described in the manner aforesaid and that the said Donor and her aforewritten shall and will at all times hereafter warrant and defend the title to the said premises unto the said Donee against any person or persons whomsoever. AND the said Donee ISHARA SILVA does hereby thankfully accept the gift hereby made subject to the condition aforesaid. IN WITNESS WHEREOF the said Donor and the said Donee do hereunto and to two others
and her aforewritten subject nevertheless to the life interest
